_comment_attention_probs_dropout_prob: Dropout probability applied after attention scores in the attention mechanism.
_comment_hidden_act: Activation function used in hidden layers and feed-forward networks (Gaussian Error Linear Unit).
_comment_hidden_dropout_prob: Dropout probability applied to outputs of embedding, encoder, and pooler.
_comment_hidden_size: Dimension of encoder and pooler layers; also the embedding vector size.
_comment_initializer_range: Standard deviation for truncated_normal_initializer used to initialize weight matrices.
_comment_intermediate_size: Intermediate layer size in the Transformer encoder's feed-forward network.
_comment_max_position_embeddings: Maximum sequence length the model can handle; determines position embedding range.
_comment_num_attention_heads: Number of heads in multi-head attention.
_comment_num_hidden_layers: Number of layers in the Transformer encoder.
_comment_pooler_fc_size: Size of fully connected layers in the BERT pooler (if used).
_comment_pooler_num_attention_heads: Number of attention heads in the BERT pooler (if used).
_comment_pooler_num_fc_layers: Number of fully connected layers in the BERT pooler (if used).
_comment_pooler_size_per_head: Size per attention head in the BERT pooler (if used).
_comment_pooler_type: Type of pooling applied to the [CLS] token output (here: linear transform followed by Tanh).
_comment_type_vocab_size: Vocabulary size for token type IDs (segment IDs), used to distinguish sentence pairs; typically 2.
_comment_vocab_size: Vocabulary size for input token IDs; determines how many distinct tokens the model recognizes.
